caption: In the video, two men are seated side by side against a backdrop featuring lush jungle scenery and the title "Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle." The man on the left, dressed in a dark blue long-sleeve shirt and wearing a gold necklace, is gesturing with his hands as he speaks, indicating he is engaged in conversation or explaining something. The man on the right, wearing a black outfit with red accents and glasses, listens attentively with a slight smile, suggesting a friendly and relaxed interaction. The setting appears to be a promotional event or interview for the movie, given the thematic background and their casual yet professional demeanor.
